_readme: TESTNET-ONLY fixture data for device verification packages. Seeds listed here are well-known BIP-39 test vectors or throwaway seeds — NEVER use these on mainnet. Never store real value against these addresses.

m_k_test.seed: abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon abandon about
m_k_test.purpose: M-K cloned authenticator test — passkey registration and unlock only, no send required
m_k_test.warning: BIP-39 vector 0 — widely known, zero real value. Testnet only.

h1_test.seed: legal winner thank year wave sausage worth useful legal winner thank yellow
h1_test.purpose: H-1 biometric 2FA send verification — small ETH Sepolia send (0.0001 ETH)
h1_test.warning: BIP-39 vector 1 — widely known, zero real value. Fund from a Sepolia faucet. Testnet only.

rasp_test.seed: letter advice cage absurd amount doctor acoustic avoid letter advice cage above
rasp_test.purpose: RASP adversarial test — wallet present to trigger gates; no send required
rasp_test.warning: BIP-39 vector 2 — widely known, zero real value. Testnet only.

platform_authenticator.note: On iOS: Face ID or Touch ID via OS biometric (not FIDO2 on native — see h1-passkey-2fa-se-verification.md architecture note). On macOS/web: Touch ID or iCloud Keychain passkey (real WebAuthn). On Android: Titan M2 or equivalent via BiometricAuth.

virtual_authenticator_cdp.how_to_enable: Chrome DevTools > More tools > WebAuthn. Add virtual authenticator: CTAP2, Internal transport, hasUserVerification: true, hasResidentKey: true.
virtual_authenticator_cdp.signcount_editing: After assertions, select the credential in the WebAuthn panel and edit signCount to simulate a stale counter. This is the recommended approach for M-K verification.
virtual_authenticator_cdp.note: CDP virtual authenticator sets navigator.webdriver = true in the controlled browser. This will also trigger the RASP browser probe (HOOKED condition). Run M-K and RASP Scope A tests in separate browser sessions.

rasp_notes.browser_probe_trigger: Run the wallet under Playwright or any CDP-controlled browser. navigator.webdriver will be true, triggering CONDITION.HOOKED and TIER.BLOCK.
rasp_notes.native_probe_status: Native OS-level probe (RaspIntegrityPlugin) is not implemented. On a real device, nativeProbeSource() fails closed to { available: false }, which maps to CONDITION.INTEGRITY_UNAVAILABLE and TIER.WARN. This is the expected honest state. See rasp-rooted-device-test.md.
rasp_notes.frida_tools: Frida 16.x. Install: pip install frida-tools. Device server from https://github.com/frida/frida/releases matching device OS.
